name: Discord-Safe
description: Read-only, stranger-safe tools only. Excludes search_chat_history/get_chat_session/list_recent_chats/palace_recall/palace_status - those read the owner's personal chat history and MemPalace, which is a data-exposure risk, not a 'safe read-only' tool, when handed to public Discord users. Execute/self-modifying tiers excluded; toolmaker hard-excluded by owner=False regardless of this list. Reviewed S35 - promoted from draft.
